vocabulary.example: 随着网络的普及，人们越来越依赖智能手机。
vocabulary.translation: As the internet has become widespread, people have become increasingly reliant on smartphones.

vocabulary.example: 这款软件通过收集用户数据来提供个性化的推荐内容。
vocabulary.translation: This software collects user data to provide personalised recommended content.

vocabulary.example: 他通过下载软件来学习新技能。
vocabulary.translation: He learns new skills by downloading software.

vocabulary.example: 这个视频平台不仅如此，还提供直播和在线课程功能。
vocabulary.translation: This video platform not only does that, but also provides live streaming and online course features.

vocabulary.example: 随着网络平台用户越来越多，做直播的人也越来越多了。
vocabulary.translation: As online platform has more and more users, the number of people doing live streams is also growing.

vocabulary.example: 我看到有些博主通过分析评论数据来决定下次直播的主题。
vocabulary.translation: I've seen some bloggers analyse comment data to decide the theme of their next live stream.

vocabulary.example: 这个视频平台不仅如此，还提供直播和在线课程功能。
vocabulary.translation: This video platform not only does that, but also provides live streaming and online course features.

vocabulary.example: 随着智能手机的普及，社交媒体已经成为人们日常生活的一部分。
vocabulary.translation: As smartphones have become widespread, social media has become a part of people's daily lives.

vocabulary.example: 随着人工智能技术的发展，很多传统工作正在发生变化。
vocabulary.translation: As artificial intelligence technology develops, many traditional jobs are undergoing changes.

vocabulary.example: 我们可以通过分析数据来了解用户的使用习惯。
vocabulary.translation: We can use data analysis to understand users' usage habits.

vocabulary.example: 随着智能手机的普及，社交媒体已经成为人们日常生活的一部分。
vocabulary.translation: As smartphones have become widespread, social media has become a part of people's daily lives.

vocabulary.example: 他每天更新社交媒体，分享生活中的点点滴滴。
vocabulary.translation: He updates his social media every day, sharing little details of his life.

vocabulary.pinyin: rén gōng zhì néng jì shù
shè jiāo méi tǐ zhàng hào
rén gōng zhì néng shù jù

key_sentences.chinese: 随着智能手机的普及，社交媒体已经成为人们日常生活的一部分。
key_sentences.pinyin: Suí zhe zhì néng shǒu jī de pǔ jí, shè jiāo méi tǐ yǐ jīng chéng wéi rén men rì cháng shēng huó de yí bù fèn.
key_sentences.english: As smartphones have become widespread, social media has become a part of people's daily lives.

key_sentences.chinese: 不仅如此，这个视频平台还提供直播和在线课程功能。
key_sentences.pinyin: Bù jǐn rú cǐ, zhè gè shì pín píng tái hái tí gōng zhí bō hé zài xiàn kè chéng gōng néng.
key_sentences.english: This video platform not only does that, but also provides live streaming and online course features.

key_sentences.chinese: 我们可以通过分析数据来了解用户的使用习惯。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men kě yǐ tōng guò fēn xī shù jù lái liǎo jiě yòng hù de shǐ yòng xí guàn.
key_sentences.english: We can use data analysis to understand users' usage habits.

key_sentences.chinese: 他每天更新社交媒体，分享生活中的点点滴滴。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā měi tiān gēng xīn shè jiāo méi tǐ, fēn xiǎng shēng huó zhōng de diǎn diǎn dī dī.
key_sentences.english: He updates his social media every day, sharing little details of his life.

key_sentences.chinese: 随着人工智能技术的发展，很多传统工作正在发生变化。
key_sentences.pinyin: Suí zhe rén gōng zhì néng jì shù de fā zhǎn, hěn duō chuán tǒng gōng zuò zhèng zài fā shēng biàn huà.
key_sentences.english: As artificial intelligence technology develops, many traditional jobs are undergoing changes.

key_sentences.chinese: 这款软件通过收集用户数据来提供个性化的推荐内容。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhè kuǎn ruǎn jiàn tōng guò shōu jí yòng hù shù jù lái tí gōng gè xìng huà de tuī jiàn nèi róng.
key_sentences.english: This software collects user data to provide personalised recommended content.

key_sentences.chinese: 他下载了新软件，方便在平台上观看网络直播。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā xià zài le xīn ruǎn jiàn, fāng biàn zài píng tái shàng guān kàn wǎng luò zhí bō.
key_sentences.english: He downloaded new software, making it convenient to watch online live streams on the platform.

key_sentences.chinese: 人工智能正在利用大量数据来改进视频评论功能。
key_sentences.pinyin: Rén gōng zhì néng zhèng zài lì yòng dà liàng shù jù lái gǎi jìn shì pín píng lùn gōng néng.
key_sentences.english: Artificial intelligence is using large amounts of data to improve video comment features.

key_sentences.chinese: 智能手机让网络和视频平台的使用变得更加方便。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhì néng shǒu jī ràng wǎng luò hé shì pín píng tái de shǐ yòng biàn de gèng jiā fāng biàn.
key_sentences.english: Smartphones have made using the internet and video platforms even more convenient.

grammar_points.title: 随着 — Along with; as (e.g. 随着科技的发展)
grammar_points.explanation: 随着 introduces a changing condition or development that drives another change. It means 'as' or 'along with' and is used to show that one thing changes in parallel with another. Structure: 随着 + noun phrase/change + (comma) + result clause. Example: 随着经济的发展，人们的生活水平提高了。(As the economy develops, people's living standards have improved.)

examples.chinese: 随着网络的普及，人们越来越依赖智能手机。
examples.pinyin: Suí zhe wǎng luò de pǔ jí, rén men yuè lái yuè yī lài zhì néng shǒu jī.
examples.english: As the internet has become widespread, people have become increasingly reliant on smartphones.

examples.chinese: 随着人工智能技术的进步，软件的功能变得越来越强大。
examples.pinyin: Suí zhe rén gōng zhì néng jì shù de jìn bù, ruǎn jiàn de gōng néng biàn de yuè lái yuè qiáng dà.
examples.english: As artificial intelligence technology advances, software features have become more and more powerful.

exercises.question: _____ 社交媒体的发展，越来越多的人开始网络直播。
Choose the sentence that uses 随着 correctly.
exercises.correct: 随着数据量的增加，分析工作变得更复杂了。
options: 随着数据量的增加，分析工作变得更复杂了。
数据量随着的增加，分析工作变得更复杂了。
分析工作随着变得更复杂了，数据量的增加。
随着分析工作变得，数据量的增加更复杂了。
option_pinyin: Suí zhe shù jù liàng de zēng jiā, fēn xī gōng zuò biàn de gèng fù zá le.
Shù jù liàng suí zhe de zēng jiā, fēn xī gōng zuò biàn de gèng fù zá le.
Fēn xī gōng zuò suí zhe biàn de gèng fù zá le, shù jù liàng de zēng jiā.
Suí zhe fēn xī gōng zuò biàn de, shù jù liàng de zēng jiā gèng fù zá le.

exercises.question: Which sentence uses 随着 correctly?
exercises.correct: 随着经济发展，人们的生活水平提高了。
options: 随着经济发展，人们的生活水平提高了。
经济发展随着，人们的生活水平提高了。
人们的生活水平提高了随着经济发展。
随着人们的生活水平，经济发展提高了。

exercises.question: 随着智能手机的普及，人们用网络平台购物越来越 _____。
Which sentence uses 随着 correctly?
exercises.correct: 随着科技发展，生活越来越方便。
options: 随着科技发展，生活越来越方便。
生活越来越方便，随着科技发展。
随着生活越来越方便，科技发展了。
科技发展随着，生活越来越方便。

grammar_points.title: 不仅如此 — Not only that; moreover (e.g. 不仅如此，还有更多功能)
grammar_points.explanation: 不仅如此 is a connecting phrase meaning 'not only that' or 'moreover'. It is used to add a further point that goes beyond what was just said. It typically appears at the beginning of a new clause. Structure: Statement 1. 不仅如此，+ additional point. Example: 这款软件可以翻译文字。不仅如此，它还能识别图片。(This software can translate text. Not only that, it can also recognise images.)

examples.chinese: 这个平台可以发布视频。不仅如此，用户还可以进行直播。
examples.pinyin: Zhè gè píng tái kě yǐ fā bù shì pín. Bù jǐn rú cǐ, yòng hù hái kě yǐ jìn xíng zhí bō.
examples.english: This platform allows users to post videos. Not only that, users can also do live streams.

examples.chinese: 人工智能可以分析大量数据。不仅如此，它还能自动生成评论报告。
examples.pinyin: Rén gōng zhì néng kě yǐ fēn xī dà liàng shù jù. Bù jǐn rú cǐ, tā hái néng zì dòng shēng chéng píng lùn bào gào.
examples.english: Artificial intelligence can analyse large amounts of data. Not only that, it can also automatically generate comment reports.

exercises.question: 这款软件可以下载视频。_____, 它还支持离线播放。
Choose the correct use of 不仅如此.
exercises.correct: 这个平台用户很多。不仅如此，它的功能也非常丰富。
options: 这个平台用户很多。不仅如此，它的功能也非常丰富。
不仅如此这个平台用户很多，它的功能也非常丰富。
这个平台不仅如此用户很多，功能也非常丰富。
它的功能非常丰富。不仅如此，这个平台用户很多。
option_pinyin: Zhè gè píng tái yòng hù hěn duō. Bù jǐn rú cǐ, tā de gōng néng yě fēi cháng fēng fù.
Bù jǐn rú cǐ zhè gè píng tái yòng hù hěn duō, tā de gōng néng yě fēi cháng fēng fù.
Zhè gè píng tái bù jǐn rú cǐ yòng hù hěn duō, gōng néng yě fēi cháng fēng fù.
Tā de gōng néng fēi cháng fēng fù. Bù jǐn rú cǐ, zhè gè píng tái yòng hù hěn duō.

exercises.question: What does 不仅如此 mean?
社交媒体让人们保持联系。_____, 它也成为了一个重要的信息平台。
Which sentence uses 不仅如此 correctly?
exercises.correct: 他会说中文。不仅如此，他还会说日语。
options: 他会说中文。不仅如此，他还会说日语。
他不仅如此会说中文，还会说日语。
他会说中文，他还会说日语不仅如此。
不仅如此他会说中文，他还会说日语。

grammar_points.title: 通过...来... — By means of; through... (e.g. 通过数据来了解用户)
grammar_points.explanation: 通过...来... expresses the method or means by which something is achieved. 通过 introduces the method or channel, and 来 links it to the action or goal. Structure: 通过 + method + 来 + action/goal. Example: 他通过练习来提高汉语水平。(He improves his Chinese level through practice.)

examples.chinese: 这家公司通过分析用户数据来改进软件功能。
examples.pinyin: Zhè jiā gōng sī tōng guò fēn xī yòng hù shù jù lái gǎi jìn ruǎn jiàn gōng néng.
examples.english: This company improves software features by analysing user data.

examples.chinese: 他通过在社交媒体上发布视频来推广自己的品牌。
examples.pinyin: Tā tōng guò zài shè jiāo méi tǐ shàng fā bù shì pín lái tuī guǎng zì jǐ de pǐn pái.
examples.english: He promotes his brand by posting videos on social media.

exercises.question: 她 _____ 每天更新社交媒体来吸引更多粉丝。
Choose the correct sentence using 通过...来...
exercises.correct: 他通过下载软件来学习新技能。
options: 他通过下载软件来学习新技能。
他来通过下载软件学习新技能。
他下载软件通过来学习新技能。
通过来他下载软件学习新技能。
option_pinyin: Tā tōng guò xià zài ruǎn jiàn lái xué xí xīn jì néng.
Tā lái tōng guò xià zài ruǎn jiàn xué xí xīn jì néng.
Tā xià zài ruǎn jiàn tōng guò lái xué xí xīn jì néng.
Tōng guò lái tā xià zài ruǎn jiàn xué xí xīn jì néng.

exercises.question: Which sentence uses 通过...来... correctly?
exercises.correct: 他通过每天练习来提高口语水平。
options: 他通过每天练习来提高口语水平。
他来通过每天练习提高口语水平。
通过他来每天练习提高口语水平。
他每天练习通过来提高口语水平。

exercises.question: 这个平台通过收集用户评论 _____ 优化推荐算法。
Which word fills in the blank: 人工智能 _____ 分析大量数据来做出预测。

culture_notes.title: China's Digital Ecosystem — A World of Its Own
culture_notes.title_chinese: 中国数字生态系统——自成一体的网络世界
culture_notes.content: China has developed one of the world's most distinctive digital ecosystems. Platforms like WeChat (微信, Wēixìn), Weibo (微博, Wēibó), and Douyin (抖音, Dǒuyīn) serve hundreds of millions of users and have become deeply integrated into daily life — used for everything from messaging and shopping to paying bills and booking transport. Unlike many global tech giants, these Chinese platforms offer a wide range of services in one app. The rise of 直播 (live streaming) has also transformed e-commerce, with influencers selling products to millions of viewers in real time. Meanwhile, China's rapid advances in 人工智能 (artificial intelligence) have positioned it as a major global competitor in the tech industry.

idioms.english: To keep up with the times; to advance with the era

quiz.question: What does 网络 mean?
Which word means 'to download'?
What does 直播 mean?
Which word means 'data'?
What does 评论 mean?
Which word means 'software; app'?
What does 人工智能 mean?
What does 更新 mean?
Fill in the blank: _____ 智能手机的普及，社交媒体越来越重要。
What does 随着 indicate?
quiz.correct: One thing changes in parallel with a developing situation
options: One thing changes in parallel with a developing situation
A necessary condition for a result
An additional point beyond what was said
The method used to achieve something

quiz.question: Fill in the blank: 这个平台可以发布视频。_____, 它还支持直播功能。
What does 不仅如此 mean?
Fill in the blank: 他通过分析数据 _____ 了解用户习惯。
What does 社交媒体 mean?
What does the phrase 分析数据 mean?
What does 平台 mean?
Which phrase means 'to post a video'?
Which Chinese platform is known for short video content and live streaming?
What does the phrase 网络平台 mean?
Which grammar pattern means 'by means of; through'?
What does '网络直播' mean?
Fill in: 人工智能正在利用大量 _____ 来改进视频评论功能。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 萨特，你最近有没有看那个博主的直播？他的视频越来越有意思。
lines.pinyin: Sà tè, nǐ zuì jìn yǒu méi yǒu kàn nà gè bó zhǔ de zhí bō? Tā de shì pín yuè lái yuè yǒu yì si.
lines.english: Sartre, have you been watching that blogger's live streams lately? His videos are getting more and more interesting.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 看过几次。他通过直播来卖东西，不仅如此，他还教大家怎么使用新软件。
lines.pinyin: Kàn guò jǐ cì. Tā tōng guò zhí bō lái mài dōng xi, bù jǐn rú cǐ, tā hái jiāo dà jiā zěn me shǐ yòng xīn ruǎn jiàn.
lines.english: I've watched a few times. He sells things through live streaming; not only that, he also teaches everyone how to use new software.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 随着这个网络平台用户越来越多，做直播的人也越来越多了。
lines.pinyin: Suí zhe zhè gè wǎng luò píng tái yòng hù yuè lái yuè duō, zuò zhí bō de rén yě yuè lái yuè duō le.
lines.english: As this online platform has more and more users, the number of people doing live streams is also growing.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是啊。我看到有些博主通过分析评论数据来决定下次直播的主题。
lines.pinyin: Shì a. Wǒ kàn dào yǒu xiē bó zhǔ tōng guò fēn xī píng lùn shù jù lái jué dìng xià cì zhí bō de zhǔ tí.
lines.english: Right. I've seen some bloggers analyse comment data to decide the theme of their next live stream.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 人工智能现在也能帮助这些平台分析数据，真的很厉害。
lines.pinyin: Rén gōng zhì néng xiàn zài yě néng bāng zhù zhè xiē píng tái fēn xī shù jù, zhēn de hěn lì hài.
lines.english: Artificial intelligence can now also help these platforms analyse data — it's really impressive.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 对。不仅如此，AI 还能自动给视频生成字幕，节省了很多时间。
lines.pinyin: Duì. Bù jǐn rú cǐ, AI hái néng zì dòng gěi shì pín shēng chéng zì mù, jié shěng le hěn duō shí jiān.
lines.english: Exactly. Not only that, AI can also automatically generate subtitles for videos, saving a lot of time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 随着科技的进步，我们的生活方式真的变化越来越大了。
lines.pinyin: Suí zhe kē jì de jìn bù, wǒ men de shēng huó fāng shì zhēn de biàn huà yuè lái yuè dà le.
lines.english: As technology advances, our way of life is really changing more and more.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 没错，所以我们也要不断学习，更新自己的知识和技能才行。
lines.pinyin: Méi cuò, suǒ yǐ wǒ men yě yào bú duàn xué xí, gēng xīn zì jǐ de zhī shi hé jì néng cái xíng.
lines.english: Exactly, so we also need to keep learning and updating our own knowledge and skills.

dialogues.title: AI and the Future of Work
dialogues.title_chinese: 人工智能与未来的工作

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 王教授，随着人工智能技术的发展，您认为未来的工作会发生什么变化？
lines.pinyin: Wáng jiào shòu, suí zhe rén gōng zhì néng jì shù de fā zhǎn, nín rèn wéi wèi lái de gōng zuò huì fā shēng shén me biàn huà?
lines.english: Professor Wang, as artificial intelligence technology develops, what changes do you think will happen to work in the future?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 很多重复性的工作会被软件和AI代替。不仅如此，新的工作岗位也会随之出现。
lines.pinyin: Hěn duō chóng fù xìng de gōng zuò huì bèi ruǎn jiàn hé AI dài tì. Bù jǐn rú cǐ, xīn de gōng zuò gǎng wèi yě huì suí zhī chū xiàn.
lines.english: Many repetitive jobs will be replaced by software and AI. Not only that, new job positions will also emerge alongside this.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 那企业通过什么方式来提高工作效率呢？
lines.pinyin: Nà qǐ yè tōng guò shén me fāng shì lái tí gāo gōng zuò xiào lǜ ne?
lines.english: So how do companies improve work efficiency?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 主要是通过分析大量数据来帮助管理者做更好的决策。
lines.pinyin: Zhǔ yào shì tōng guò fēn xī dà liàng shù jù lái bāng zhù guǎn lǐ zhě zuò gèng hǎo de jué cè.
lines.english: Mainly by analysing large amounts of data to help managers make better decisions.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 社交媒体对商业的影响越来越大，您怎么看？
lines.pinyin: Shè jiāo méi tǐ duì shāng yè de yǐng xiǎng yuè lái yuè dà, nín zěn me kàn?
lines.english: Social media's influence on business is growing more and more — what's your view on that?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 随着平台用户的增加，商家越来越多地通过直播和视频来推广产品。
lines.pinyin: Suí zhe píng tái yòng hù de zēng jiā, shāng jiā yuè lái yuè duō de tōng guò zhí bō hé shì pín lái tuī guǎng chǎn pǐn.
lines.english: As platform users grow, businesses are increasingly promoting their products through live streams and videos.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 感谢您的分享。最后，您对年轻人有什么建议？
lines.pinyin: Gǎn xiè nín de fēn xiǎng. Zuì hòu, nín duì nián qīng rén yǒu shén me jiàn yì?
lines.english: Thank you for sharing. Finally, what advice do you have for young people?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 要不断学习新技术，通过了解人工智能和数据分析来让自己更有竞争力。
lines.pinyin: Yào bú duàn xué xí xīn jì shù, tōng guò liǎo jiě rén gōng zhì néng hé shù jù fēn xī lái ràng zì jǐ gèng yǒu jìng zhēng lì.
lines.english: Keep learning new technologies; make yourself more competitive by understanding artificial intelligence and data analysis.
